title: xyris capillaris
intro: Xyris capillaris, also known as Yellow-eyed Grass, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States and Puerto Rico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Xyris capillaris include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Xyris capillaris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
